questions.question: List the labels of all fiscal years after 2010.
questions.reasoning: This query retrieves labels for FiscalYear entities. It uses a FILTER with a numeric comparison ('> 2010') on the 'fy_value' attribute, casting it to an integer. This adheres to the single-entity and filter requirements for Tier 2.

questions.question: How many matters were filed in fiscal year 2015?
questions.reasoning: This query counts Matter entities. It uses a FILTER for exact equality on the 'matter_fy' attribute. This satisfies the single-entity and filter requirements for Tier 2.

questions.question: Count the number of fiscal years with a value greater than '2010'.
questions.reasoning: This query counts the number of 'FiscalYear' entities. It uses a FILTER expression to select fiscal years where the 'fy_value' attribute is numerically greater than '2010'. This adheres to the single-entity and filter requirements for Tier 2.

questions.question: How many matters have a fiscal year of 2010?
questions.reasoning: The question asks for a count of 'Matters' filtered by their 'matter_fy' attribute. This directly maps to a single entity type query with a FILTER condition on an attribute value. The `rdf:type` for Matter is included, and the filter uses an exact string match for the fiscal year.

questions.question: How many matters are associated with each fiscal year?
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.reasoning: This query joins 'Matter' and 'FiscalYear' entities using the 'matter_in_fy' relationship. It counts the number of matters for each fiscal year, satisfying the two-entity join and aggregation requirements. Both entities are explicitly typed. The filter is implicit in the GROUP BY.

questions.question: List the enforcement types and the number of matters associated with each, for fiscal year 2010.
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?enforcementTypeLabel (COUNT(?matter) AS ?matterCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_has_enforcement_type> ?enforcementType .
  ?enforcementType <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/EnforcementType> .
  ?enforcementType <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/enforcement_type_label> ?enforcementTypeLabel .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_fy> "2010" .
} GROUP BY ?enforcementTypeLabel ORDER BY DESC(?matterCount)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate
questions.expected_answer:
Consent Order Accepted for Comment | 23
Part III Administrative Complaint | 3
questions.reasoning: This query joins 'Matter' and 'EnforcementType' entities via 'matter_has_enforcement_type'. It counts matters per enforcement type and includes a filter on the 'matter_fy' attribute of the 'Matter' entity, specifically for '2010'. Both entities are explicitly typed, and the aggregation satisfies the requirements.

questions.question: Which industries have matters in fiscal year 2015, and how many matters are in each of those industries?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?industryLabel (COUNT(?matter) AS ?matterCount) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_industry> ?industry .
  ?industry <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Industry> .
  ?industry <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/industry_label> ?industryLabel .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_fy> "2015" .
} GROUP BY ?industryLabel ORDER BY DESC(?matterCount)
questions.tier_classifier_reasoning: 2 distinct entity types connected by 1 predicate

It counts matters per industry and filters for matters specifically from fiscal year '2015'. Both entity types are explicitly declared, and the query includes an aggregation and a filter on an attribute of one of the entities.

questions.question: For each industry, how many matters are associated with it, and what is the average fiscal year of those matters?
questions.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?industryLabel (COUNT(DISTINCT ?matter) AS ?matterCount) (AVG(xsd:integer(?fyValue)) AS ?averageFiscalYear) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees> WHERE {
  ?industry <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Industry> .
  ?industry <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/industry_label> ?industryLabel .
  ?matter <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/Matter> .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_industry> ?industry .
  ?matter <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/matter_in_fy> ?fiscalYear .
  ?fiscalYear <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/type/FiscalYear> .
  ?fiscalYear <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-ftc-consent-decrees/pred/fy_value> ?fyValue .
} GROUP BY ?industryLabel

questions.question: What is the average number of distinct enforcement types associated with matters in each fiscal year?
questions.reasoning: This query uses a nested subquery (Option B) to first count the distinct enforcement types for each matter within a fiscal year. The outer query then calculates the average of these counts for each fiscal year. It involves three entity types: FiscalYear, Matter, and EnforcementType, connected by two relationships: `fy_includes_matter` and `matter_has_enforcement_type`. All entity variables have `rdf:type` triples.
